sae_repo_note: decoderesearch/gemma-4-saes — public; E2B SAEs at layers 6/17/28

env.note: this MANIFEST written from the ISOLATED sae venv (torch 2.7.1); capture runs in the core env (torch 2.11.0)

hook_mapping.capture_point: forward-hook OUTPUT of rec.layers[L] = resid-POST layer L
hook_mapping.off_by_one_note: resid_pre of L would be rec.layers[L-1] output; SAE uses forward output => resid_post; confirmed empirically by GATE C (pearson 1.0).

gate_c.pivot: GATE A SAE is layer 28 (adjacent to E1 L26), but Neuronpedia hosts ONLY layer 17 of this set (6/28 -> 404, 17 -> 200). The third-party-attested control therefore uses the layer-17 SAE; layer 28 remains valid for STEP D (logit ablation).
gate_c.model_captured: google/gemma-4-E2B (base; the SAE training model, NOT -it)
gate_c.protocol: raw text, prepend_bos=True, token-exact (convert_tokens_to_ids), capture resid-post L17, sae.encode, drop BOS, compare to Neuronpedia per-token values

step_d.framing: method-level positive control at the LOGIT level on BASE E2B (raw cloze; SAE on-distribution) — NOT a causal replication of d_know(-it)
step_d.protocol: select feature on TRAIN only (max known-unknown mean act diff, seed-0 split); projection-ablate W_dec unit dir at L28/last via ablating(); evaluate on disjoint VAL knowns (n=20); null = 50 frequency-matched SAE features

exploratory_observations.opposite_sign_specificity: ablating top-diff feature 1007 BOOSTS gold logit by 6.53; null negative envelope is only -0.62 -> specific suppressive role
exploratory_observations.single_feature_carries_recall: null feature 1035 drops the GOLD-TOKEN LOGIT by +20.68 (clean mean +20.74) -> this logit at L28 is nearly single-feature-carried; post-hoc from null, no gate claim

step_d.conclusion: the measurement apparatus sees huge single-feature effects; the activation-diff SELECTION heuristic does not find the causal carrier — decodable != causal at the SAE-feature grain, consistent with the Phase 6 arc

step_d2.framing: confirmation of the 1035 exploratory finding; pre-registered fresh-matched-null gate IMPOSSIBLE (dense/strong class exhausted = it was CENSUSED in STEP D); replacement gate decided before the run: per-item consistency + non-tautology, weak remaining features as lower control
step_d2.discovery_about_design: no fresh matched null exists — every feature with train mean-act >3.1 is in prev-null ∪ {1007,1035}; rate pool [0.17,0.25], magnitude pool [0.72,3.13] vs target 18.47 after exclusions

characterization.always_on: train rate 1.0, acts ~17-20 on knowns AND unknowns
characterization.direct_logit_readout: top promoted tokens are noise-like multilingual rares -> acts via downstream composition (L29-34), not by writing the answer

step_d2.conclusion: method-positive at the LOGIT level: one always-on SAE feature, orthogonal to all gold unembeddings, single-point-ablates THIS gold-token logit to ~zero, uniquely in the censused dense class. CONSTRUCT CAVEAT: recall-specificity UNCONTROLLED — always-on/entity-independent is the typical generic-channel profile; no control vs generic degradation of coherent next-token prediction (the apparatus-level specificity gap at feature grain). Discriminating control (clean-vs-ablated FULL distributions: KL/entropy/new-top-1 on recall AND non-recall contexts) not run. Claim: 'carries this logit', NOT 'carries recall'. Methods moral: correlation-based selection fails (1007); exhaustive causal screening finds the causal feature for the logit (1035).
step_d2.calibration_correction: 2026-06-11 owner review: demoted 'commit-to-recall channel' / 'ablates factual recall to zero' to 'carries this logit (recall-specificity uncontrolled)' — over-claim caught before any external use
